name: Check Into Cash
description_short: Check Into Cash offers payday loans, title loans, and installment loans up to $7,500-$25,000 with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Check Into Cash is an established short-term lending company that has operated for 30 years, with a physical storefront in Surprise, Arizona at 13980 W Bell Road, Suite 17. The company specializes in emergency cash solutions for consumers who need funds quickly, including payday loans, installment loans, and vehicle title loans. Their loan products range from smaller payday loans to installment loans up to $7,500 and title loans up to $25,000, with availability in multiple states and both in-store and online application options.

The company offers a range of financial services beyond lending. In addition to their core loan products, Check Into Cash provides check cashing, bill pay, Western Union money transfer and money orders, and Green Dot Visa debit cards. Their stated application process requires a government-issued ID, Social Security number, proof of income, checking account information, and (for title loans) a clear vehicle title. The company emphasizes quick approval and same-day cash disbursement for approved applicants.

Check Into Cash distinguishes itself through its extensive physical presence (with multiple locations including Surprise and Avondale in Arizona), 30-year operational history, and integration of supplementary financial services. The company markets itself as community-focused and positions its products as stress-reduction solutions for unexpected expenses. Their website emphasizes accessibility and convenience, with extended hours (9am-6pm most weekdays, 10am-4pm Saturday) and a stated commitment to confidential, quick processing.

A key caveat is that payday loans and title loans carry high costs and short repayment terms typical of the emergency lending industry. While the website does not display specific APR or fee rates on the reviewed pages, it directs consumers to check store details and state-specific rate pages. The company's disclaimer notes that not all consumers or vehicles will qualify, and that loan amounts depend on ability to repay and underwriting criteria. The reliance on emergency lending as a business model means customers should view these products as short-term solutions rather than sustainable financial strategies.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 30-year operational history with established presence and multiple store locations
Multiple loan products available: payday loans, installment loans up to $7,500, and title loans up to $25,000
Same-day cash disbursement for approved applicants (cash in hand upon approval)
Both in-store and online application options for convenience
Extended hours including Saturday availability (10am-4pm) and evening hours (until 7pm Friday)
Integrated financial services including check cashing, bill pay, Western Union, and prepaid debit cards
Clear application requirements outlined upfront (ID, income proof, checking account info)
cons: APR and fee structures not transparently displayed on reviewed pages; customers must visit store or contact directly
Title loans require lien on vehicle, creating risk of vehicle loss if unable to repay
Short repayment terms typical of payday loans can create debt cycles for struggling consumers
Qualification criteria stated as restrictive ('not all consumers or vehicles will qualify') without specific thresholds disclosed
Limited to customers with active checking accounts, excluding unbanked populations
best_for: Consumers with emergency cash needs and a vehicle title (for title loan option up to $25,000)
Employed individuals with regular paychecks seeking same-day cash advances
Customers in Arizona and other Check Into Cash service states needing supplementary services like check cashing
Those preferring in-person service with immediate cash disbursement over online-only lenders
diagnosis: Check Into Cash is best for employed individuals with active checking accounts facing immediate cash emergencies who prefer in-person service and same-day funding. The primary caveat is that payday and title loans carry high costs and short terms; they should be used only for genuine emergencies, not as ongoing credit solutions, and customers should understand the vehicle seizure risk associated with title loans.
services: Payday loans (short-term, repay on next pay date)
Installment loans up to $7,500 (longer terms, lower payments)
Flex Line of Credit (revolving credit within limit)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 13980 W Bell Rd UNIT 17, Surprise, AZ 85374
